title: Space Force Software Engineer
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering, or a related Science, Engineering, Technology or Mathematics field
OR a Master's degree plus 3 years of job-related experience
preferred_qualifications: Strong understanding of API design, testing, development, and management
Familiarity with Scaled Agile methodology and best practices
Knowledge of DevOps principles (CI/CD pipelines, GitOps, automation, configuration management, infrastructure as code)
Experience with AWS (AWS Solutions Architect preferred), Azure is a plus
Familiarity with containerization tools such as Docker and Kubernetes
Understanding of security best practices (risk, compliance, vulnerability management, encryption, PKI, incident response, auditing, and monitoring)
Strong ability to work effectively with development, operations, and security teams
Proficient in generating documentation and sharing knowledge
Experience with prompt engineering and AI tools
responsibilities: Develop and deploy state-of-the-art ground operational systems
Work as an integral part of a cross-functional team for the SDA (Space Development Agency) GMI (Ground Management & Integration) program
Contribute to the success and innovation of the program
education: Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering, or a related Science, Engineering, Technology or Mathematics field (or Master's degree)
tech_stack: AWS (EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, EBS/EFS, VPC, DNS, IAM, KMS, CloudWatch, CloudTrail)
